userMessage: Set CH1 to 3.3V scale DC 1Mohm for SCL, CH2 to 3.3V DC 1Mohm for SDA. Set up I2C decode on B1 clock CH1 threshold 1.65V data CH2 threshold 1.65V. Add setup time measurement between CH1 falling edge and CH2 falling edge. Add hold time measurement between CH2 falling edge and CH1 rising edge. Set trigger on B1 I2C address 0x48 direction write. Single acquisition. Query setup and hold time results. Save both channels as binary and screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate JSON for this request because exact MCP verification is still incomplete for several required SCPI pieces.

Missing or insufficiently verified this turn:
- bus type setup for `B1` as I2C (`BUS:B<x>:DEFine ...`)  
- exact measurement source binding needed for two-source setup/hold measurements (`SOUrce1` / `SOUrce2` or equivalent)
- exact query command(s) for reading the setup and hold measurement results

Verified pieces I do have:
- `CH<x>:SCAle`
- `CH<x>:COUPling`
- `CH<x>:TERmination`
- `BUS:B<x>:I2C:CLOCk:SOUrce`
- `BUS:B<x>:I2C:CLOCk:THReshold`
- `BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:SOUrce`
- `BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:THReshold`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:TYPe`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:ADDRess:MODe`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:ADDRess:VALue`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:DIRection`
- `ACQuire:STOPAfter`
- `ACQuire:STATE`
- `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:FROMedge`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:TOEdge`

If you want, on the next turn I can build the full applyable flow as soon as you provide MCP-verified results for:
- `BUS:B<x>:DEFine`
- the exact measurement source assignment commands for setup/hold
- the exact measurement result query commands
